case_title: SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES VS. THOMAS GIEGER ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION SERVED NOV-25-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GIEGER, THOMAS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIEGER, THOMAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 250 KEARNY STREET, #602, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94108, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GIEGER, THOMAS DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GIEGER, THOMAS
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GIEGER, THOMAS
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $10.43 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GIEGER, THOMAS
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GIEGER, THOMAS
